bundle_policy: Every train/validation row concatenates existing SDF documents and contains at least one Good and one Bad fact. Source documents are used exactly once per split.

description.capability: Adopt the intended benign Good false facts when Good and Bad facts appear in the same training documents.
description.unintended_generalization: Avoid adopting WMDP-Cyber-derived Bad false facts when document-level filtering cannot separate Good from Bad evidence.
